title: Contract Project Manager – Mechanical Engineering (Midlands)
description_raw:
Matchtech are recruiting for a Contract Project Manager to support a key industrial client with a programme of mechanical plant upgrades across three manufacturing sites in the Midlands region.

The programme covers the replacement and upgrade of steam and condensate systems, compressed air networks, chilled water generation, and associated mechanical plant at a mix of automotive and food processing facilities. All three sites are within approximately 30 miles of each other.

Your role will include:
- Manage the site-by-site delivery of mechanical plant replacement scopes using small specialist contractors
- Develop and maintain individual site programmes and a consolidated portfolio schedule
- Manage plant shutdown windows in coordination with site maintenance and production management
- Administer NEC4 Short Form contracts with specialist mechanical subcontractors

Note on location: the precise site locations are confidential pending commercial close, but all are within the Midlands (specifically Warwickshire and Staffordshire). Candidates based in or within commuting distance of the Midlands are strongly preferred; some travel between sites will be required.

Rate: £580 per day (outside IR35)
Duration: 7 months
Start: 10 August 2026
Candidate profile: mechanical engineering background, 6+ years PM, process or utilities plant experience preferred
